# Godhans

> Godhans is a Tree Service serving Jacksonville, NC. Service area: regional. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.
